prerequisites.value: Improved Unarmed Strike, Intimidate 1 rank, ability to create magical darkness.

description.value: **Benefit:** While fighting within an area of magical darkness, you gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls with unarmed strikes, or a +4 bonus against opponents that are shaken, frightened, or panicked. You also gain a +2 morale bonus on Acrobatics and Intimidate checks.
